Last session note was: 'Session 104 -- US-227 BLOCKED, BL-007 filed.' === SESSION 105 FINAL FLIP (2026-04-29 morning) === Operator ran bash deploy/deploy-server.sh; first run failed silently (sudo: a terminal is required + remote shell had no `set -e`, so misleading 'Unit installed' echo printed though all 3 sudo commands had failed). Patched deploy-server.sh in same session: (a) `ssh -t` for sudo-bearing commands so sudo can prompt interactively; (b) `set -e` inside install heredoc so failures actually halt; (c) smarter step 5 cutover gated on `systemctl is-active --quiet` (skip pkill once systemd-managed) AND broader `[u]vicorn` pattern that catches both bash nohup wrapper AND detached uvicorn child (the prior `nohup .*[u]vicorn` only matched the wrapper, leaving the child alive). Operator re-ran; sudo prompted 4x (3 install + 1 restart), worked end-to-end. AC #5 cutover ✅ verified live: legacy nohup PID 1073743 cleanly cut over; systemd-managed PID 1734382 active since 2026-04-29 07:59:12 CDT; bundled bash test 5/5 PASS. AC #6 process-kill recovery ✅ verified live: BEFORE PID 1734382 -> sudo kill -9 -> AFTER PID 1737523 (different = restart confirmed); state active; uptime advanced to 08:11:37 CDT; /api/v1/health 200; recovery time ~10s. AC #7 reboot survival deferred to CIO discretion (story explicitly says 'if CIO willing'; non-blocking). Sprint 18 status: 8/8 passes:true. US-231 completedDate=2026-04-29.
